creator: lars.stokholm@gmail.com
text:
In the most recent version of GIMP in ports (2.6.1_2,1), File > Open Location doesn't work. I get an error saying "No such file or directory". I left the GNOMEVFS option on at install and gnome-vfs-2.22.0_2 has been installed to my system.

How-To-Repeat: Install graphics/gimp-app with default options.
Go to File > Open Location, input a location and press Open.
